memoryArtifacts.headline: Saint Faiths Norfolk interior
memoryArtifacts.description: st faiths is a church in the Norfolk countryside. Built in the fourteenth century there are traces of medieval paintings on the walls. Constructed of Flint with brick dressings the church fell into a derelict state in the 1930's but someone climbed in the window in 1967 and discovered the artwork. The church was lovingly restored but remains unused.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tudenham於大約1371年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可時，她的父親Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham26歲，母親Margaret Weyland26歲。她於1389年與Oliver Le Gros在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tudenham于大约1371年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可时，她的父亲Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham26岁，母亲Margaret Weyland26岁。她于1389年与Oliver Le Gros在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tudenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tuddenham
meanings: English: locative name, principally from from East or West Tuddenham (Norfolk), but also from Tuddenham (Suffolk) or Tuddenham Saint Martin (Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tudenham was born about 1371, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Weyland, was 26. She married Oliver Le Gros in 1389, in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1423, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tudenham est née environ 1371, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Weyland, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Oliver Le Gros en 1389, à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1423, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tudenham um 1371 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Weyland 26. Sie hat 1389 in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Oliver Le Gros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1423 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tudenham è nata il circa 1371 nel Crostwick, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Weyland, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Oliver Le Gros nel 1389, nel Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1423, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tudenhamが約1371年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックで生まれた時，父Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenhamは26歳，母Margaret Weylandは26歳であった。1389年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスでOliver Le Grosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tudenham(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Weyland(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1389년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에서 Oliver Le Gros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tudenham nasceu aproximadamente 1371, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Weyland, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Oliver Le Gros em 1389, em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1423, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tudenham родилась около 1371 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Weyland, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Oliver Le Gros в 1389 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1423 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tudenham nació aproximadamente 1371, en Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Weyland, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Oliver Le Gros en 1389, en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1423, a la edad de 53 años.
